title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Sika India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Sika India
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!
